programs.desc: Dan and Amber finally ended their relationship. Is a holiday romance in Thailand on the cards for Essex's most eligible bachelor.

programs.desc: US reality series. When all hell breaks loose at choir auditions as Jen confronts Angie H, Lisa is prompted to recommit to her faith as a result.

programs.desc: US reality series. The Jersey shore weekend continues with Bill Aydin rejecting a birthday party invite and Teresa and Louie saying goodbye to Gabriella.
